clusters.justification: These terms represent the macroscopic processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and interoception, driven primarily by the large-scale co-activation of insula-cingulate and amygdalar hubs.
This domain captures the computation of subjective reward, reinforcement learning, and goal-oriented decision-making that reliably maps onto overarching frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuitry.
These terms share a dependence on internally directed representation and multi-agent modeling, drawing mechanistically on the medial prefrontal and temporal hubs of the default mode network.
